content.shortDescription: A lively flash mob performance celebrating creativity, music, and teamwork as part of GLOBIZZ’26.
content.description:
As part of the annual institute industry interface meet GLOBIZZ’26, the Department of International Business, Pondicherry University, is hosting an energetic Flash Mob event.
This exciting performance will bring together students for a lively and vibrant celebration of creativity, music, and teamwork. The event aims to build enthusiasm on campus and showcase student talent through a dynamic group performance.
content.Venue: Library Junction, near I ❤️ PU, Pondicherry University
